metadata.description: Personal, battle-tested Claude Code skills — house patterns so new projects don't reinvent the wheel.

plugins.name: coding-style
plugins.description: Cross-domain code + environment conventions, independent of any app stack: lint-format (language-agnostic tooling floor), ts-style (TypeScript/JavaScript house style), svelte (Svelte + SvelteKit style), and fish (Eetu's default shell).

plugins.name: homebrew
plugins.description: House patterns for self-hosted homebrew web apps: shared look (halo-design), frontend (spa-frontend), backend (rust-axum), and the assembly+deploy orchestrator (sibling-app).

plugins.name: creative-coding
plugins.description: Generative / canvas visual effects independent of any app stack: ascii-artist (animated ASCII art — masks, density ramps, particle systems, fbm-noise fields, pseudo-3D, performance rules, single-file delivery).
